stereotype: «ResourceAccess» — owns usageLog (Append-only log of metered compute usage events)
volatility: Usage Log STORAGE volatility — how metered-compute-usage facts (observed compute consumption attributed to an operated app over a window) are persisted and read back. Postgres/CNPG append-only today; a managed time-series/usage-ledger service or metering/FinOps export store tomorrow.

outbound.name: usageLog
outbound.how: Sole inbound edge to usageLog: append entry / read range (idempotency: runtime event id) — architecture.dsl line 403

ops.note: Batch INSERT immutable usage rows; on UNIQUE(runtime_event_id) violation returns prior EntryRef as idempotent success (no double-count). Drives UC4 Path B reconcile tick (architecture.dsl line 659). Short timeout (~10-15s), retryable on Transient/Infrastructure, terminal on ContractMisuse.

fields.name: Events
fields.note: batch of observed compute-usage facts; each event.RuntimeEventID is the globally-unique dedup token

fields.name: Refs
fields.note: opaque references to the recorded entries, in input order; prior EntryRef returned on duplicate RuntimeEventID (idempotent success)

ops.stereotype: Write — append final usage batch at withdraw
ops.note: Same shape as recordComputeUsage. Distinct business moment: the operated system is being withdrawn (ncuc3). Architecture.dsl line 736. Same idempotency on RuntimeEventID UNIQUE constraint.

fields.name: Events
fields.note: final batch of observed compute-usage facts captured at withdraw; same shape as recordComputeUsage events

fields.name: Refs
fields.note: opaque references to the recorded entries, in input order

ops.stereotype: Read — replay the cycle's usage facts
ops.note: Pure read of the immutable append-only log. UsageRangeQuery{CustomerID, CycleID, OperatedAppID?}: OperatedAppID nil = whole cycle (UC6 line 703, settlement); OperatedAppID set = one app's facts (ncuc6 line 674, cost projection). Empty cycle → empty slice, not NotFound. Retryable on Transient/Infrastructure.

fields.name: Query
fields.note: UsageRangeQuery{CustomerID, CycleID, OperatedAppID *OperatedAppID}; OperatedAppID nil = whole cycle; set = one app's facts

fields.name: Events
fields.note: immutable metered-usage entries for the cycle in append order; empty slice if no facts (never NotFound)

dataContracts: CustomerID = uuid.UUID (PROVISIONAL — aligned with revenueLedgerAccess; canonical key deferred to settlementManager D-MST)
ComputeUnits { Amount float64; Unit string } (infrastructure-neutral, never a priced/monetary amount)

UsageEvent { CustomerID; OperatedAppID; CycleID; Units ComputeUnits; RuntimeEventID; RawMeter []byte; WindowStart time.Time; WindowEnd time.Time; OccurredAt time.Time; RecordedAt time.Time; Ref EntryRef }
errorModel: fwra.Error (framework-go/resourceaccess.Error). Kinds: Transient (Retryable=true), Infrastructure (Retryable=true), ContractMisuse (Retryable=false). No Conflict (append-only — no optimistic-concurrency contention). No public Duplicate error (duplicate RuntimeEventID maps to idempotent success).
idempotency: Write verbs: caller-supplied RuntimeEventID + DB UNIQUE constraint (operational-concepts.md line 309). Duplicate event id → returns prior EntryRef as idempotent success. NOT fwra.IdempotencyKey (that is the head-state discipline; here the runtime's own globally-unique event id is the natural dedup token). Read: pure, no key.

revisions.summary: Initial design and freeze. 3 ops (recordComputeUsage, recordFinalUsage, readRange). Append-only ledger discipline. UsageRangeQuery shape (Q5) resolved at freeze. Batch write shape (Q2) confirmed. Senior review APPROVED-AND-FROZEN 2026-05-30.
